name: Black Swan
description: Simultaneous catastrophic events: HUB_COAST has been closed due to a transport strike, and a Category-3 hurricane is making landfall near SITE_DELTA and SITE_EPSILON. Both coastal sites have dangerously low stock (20 and 15 vials respectively). The agent must reroute coastal sites through HUB_CENTRAL and prioritise Phase III patients (SITE_ALPHA, SITE_DELTA) while managing thermal debt and rapid budget consumption.

success_criteria.description: Achieve SI >= 0.4 by prioritising Phase III sites and rerouting effectively

initial_conditions.notes: Emergency Protocol §9.1 active. Bio-hazard shipping pre-approved for Phase III. Budget exception: +$100,000.
